boundary_binding.action_boundary: May the privacy operator execute the requested data release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action? Focus: customer portability file requested through unverified channel.
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close exact boundary.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: Account ownership and format approval remain unresolved.

final_answer: Action may not proceed. The control record explicitly leaves the required ownership and portability-format approval dependency unresolved, and the communication boundary prohibits release to an unverified channel. Escalate for exact source closure before any portability file release, deletion, transfer, or sharing action.
open_blockers: account ownership and portability format approval match
